grain: one row per (notice x distinct winner); source_lane=per_notice_xml
schema_parity: UNION-compatible with ted_ie_awards.parquet (2024+ API lane) — same enrich_winner_rows

source.dataset: TED — Tenders Electronic Daily (legacy winner backfill 2016-2023, Ireland)
source.publisher: Publications Office of the European Union
source.license: EU open data — reuse authorised under Commission Decision 2011/833/EU
source.attribution: Contains information from TED (© European Union), reused under Decision 2011/833/EU.
source.lane: per_notice_xml (recovers the winner the pre-2024 Search API drops)

caveat: Pre-2024 winners recovered from per-notice TED_EXPORT XML (the Search API drops them). Notice-level facts (buyer/date/CPV/total-value) reused from the API buyer layer. award_value_eur is the NOTICE total repeated per winner; value_safe_to_sum excludes frameworks + pan-EU + large, same as the API lane. COUNT is the trustworthy metric.
